texto: Then just how do you conduct business, Vance? I knew you were hiding something from me. Something told me you were their attorney. You definitely have the look of one. It was just something about the way your pant legs whispered above the shine of your shoes but I didn’t want to believe it,” she recalled from the day of the chaos on the premises of Stone & Nichols. She thought he looked darn good then as well as today.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lawana Dinkins que provoca temas ligados a tempo. Ao questionar “Then just how do you conduct business, Vance? I knew you were hiding something from me. Something…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, contemporary-romance, reflexao, com foco em reflexao.
